_comment: 示例：自动生成多语言文本后完成音频生成和训练 / Example: generate multilingual text before audio generation and training

experiment._comment: 修改 name 和 languages 即可创建独立任务 / Change name and languages to create an isolated job
experiment.name: auto_text_reader
experiment._comment_languages: 按需选择内置语言；中日韩会自动路由到专用 G2P / Select built-in languages as needed; Chinese, Japanese and Korean use dedicated G2P routes

initialization._comment: 从零训练自动文本模型 / Train the auto-text model from scratch

text_generation._comment: builtin 不需要文本模型；适合流程验证和覆盖种子 / builtin needs no text model; use it for workflow validation and coverage seeding

generation._comment: 自动使用 datasets/text_corpora 下的共享文本，不需要 text_manifest / Automatically consumes the shared corpus under datasets/text_corpora; no text_manifest is needed

voice._comment: 使用 Prompt 设计统一音色 / Design one shared voice from a prompt
voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.prompt: A warm, natural adult voice with clear pronunciation and calm delivery.
voice.reference_text: Hello, this reference voice will be used for multilingual training.

training._comment: 先用 --max-steps 10 验证，再进行正式训练 / Validate with --max-steps 10 before full training
